account_id.description: The account id associated with the hold

account_no.description: The account number associated with the hold

created.description: The creation date of the hold

idemkey.description: The idempotency key used when initially creating this hold.

offset_account_id.description: The offset account id associated with the hold

offset_account_no.description: The offset account number associated with the hold

reference_id.description: An external ID provided by the payment network to represent this transaction.

tenant.description: The tenant associated with this hold, in the form "<bankid>_<partnerid>"

updated.description: The date the hold was last update

uuid.description: The unique identifier of the hold transaction.
